allow: Bash(curl -s https://calendar.library.ucsc.edu/spaces/availability/grid -H 'accept: application/json, text/javascript, */*; q=0.01' -H 'content-type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8' -H 'origin: https://calendar.library.ucsc.edu' -H 'referer: https://calendar.library.ucsc.edu/spaces' -H 'x-requested-with: XMLHttpRequest' --data-raw 'lid=16577&gid=34977&eid=-1&seat=0&seatId=0&zone=0&start=2026-05-19&end=2026-05-20&pageIndex=0&pageSize=18')

Bash(curl -s https://calendar.library.ucsc.edu/spaces/availability/grid -H 'accept: application/json' -H 'content-type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded; charset=UTF-8' -H 'origin: https://calendar.library.ucsc.edu' -H 'referer: https://calendar.library.ucsc.edu/spaces' -H 'x-requested-with: XMLHttpRequest' --data-raw 'lid=16578&gid=0&eid=-1&seat=0&seatId=0&zone=0&start=2026-05-20&end=2026-05-21&pageIndex=0&pageSize=50')

Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.loads\(sys.stdin.read\(\)\) slots = data.get\('slots', []\) print\(f'Slots returned for June 15: {len\(slots\)}'\) if slots: print\('First slot:', json.dumps\(slots[0]\)\) ")
